Items.Name: Swarm Decal
Items.Description:
An exclusive placeable decal, to add flair and decoration to bases.

This decal commemorates completion of the Swarm expedition, and survival of an existential threat.

Items.Name: Royals Poster
Items.Description:
An exclusive piece of self-adhesive, crease-proof wall art.

This poster depicts the Royal fragment of the Traveller soul. A muse, a leader, a being of innate grace and courage. These worlds were made for you...

Items.Name: Sages Poster
Items.Description:
An exclusive piece of self-adhesive, crease-proof wall art.

This poster depicts the Sage fragment of the Traveller soul. Brilliant, deep, and wise. You know the universe profoundly...

Items.Name: Weavers Poster
Items.Description:
An exclusive piece of self-adhesive, crease-proof wall art.

This poster depicts the Weaver fragment of the Traveller soul. A shaper of reality: a dreamer and creator. Your destiny is your own.

Items.Name: Weavers Flag
Items.Description: An ornamental flag for base decoration, celebrating the Weaver fragment of the Traveller soul.

Items.Name: Swallowtail Weavers Flag
Items.Description: An ornamental flag for base decoration, celebrating the Weaver fragment of the Traveller soul.

Items.Name: Tapered Weavers Flag
Items.Description: An ornamental flag for base decoration, celebrating the Weaver fragment of the Traveller soul.

Items.Name: Sages Flag
Items.Description: An ornamental flag for base decoration, celebrating the Sage fragment of the Traveller soul.

Items.Name: Swallowtail Sages Flag
Items.Description: An ornamental flag for base decoration, celebrating the Sage fragment of the Traveller soul.

Items.Name: Tapered Sages Flag
Items.Description: An ornamental flag for base decoration, celebrating the Sage fragment of the Traveller soul.

Items.Name: Royals Flag
Items.Description: An ornamental flag for base decoration, celebrating the Royal fragment of the Traveller soul.

Items.Name: Swallowtail Royals Flag
Items.Description: An ornamental flag for base decoration, celebrating the Royal fragment of the Traveller soul.

Items.Name: Tapered Royals Flag
Items.Description: An ornamental flag for base decoration, celebrating the Royal fragment of the Traveller soul.

Items.Name: Swarm Banner
Items.Description:
Equip this exclusive Personal Flair in commemoration of the Swarm expedition, and survival of an existential threat.

Apply this banner to your profile at an Appearance Modifier.

Items.Name: Title: 'the Fragmented'
Items.Description:
An exclusive Explorer Title, commemorating completion of the Swarm expedition, and survival of an existential threat.

Apply this title to your banner at an Appearance Modifier.

Items.Name: Direwasp Plating
Items.Description:
An exclusive Exosuit Appearance Override.

Heavy-duty combat armour, forged from salvaged swarmer alloys. Imperceptible vibrations in the metal help to deflect incoming fire.

Transform the appearance of your Exosuit at an Appearance Modifier.

Items.Name: Direwasp Boots
Items.Description:
An exclusive Exosuit Appearance Override.

Heavy-duty combat armour, forged from salvaged swarmer alloys. Imperceptible vibrations in the metal help to deflect incoming fire.

Transform the appearance of your Exosuit at an Appearance Modifier.

Items.Name: Direwasp Gloves
Items.Description:
An exclusive Exosuit Appearance Override.

Heavy-duty combat armour, forged from salvaged swarmer alloys. Imperceptible vibrations in the metal help to deflect incoming fire.

Transform the appearance of your Exosuit at an Appearance Modifier.

Items.Name: Direwasp Disintegrator
Items.Description:
An exclusive Multi-Tool.

Fabricated from corrupted ichor alloys, this powerful rifle is precisely calibrated for comfort and balance, allowing the user to eliminate great swarms of hostiles without fatigue.

Take this Multi-Tool to add it to your collection, or Exchange it with your current Multi-Tool. Swap between active Multi-Tools from the Utilities section
of the Quick Menu (QUICK_MENU).

Items.Name: Direwasp Helm
Items.Description:
An exclusive Exosuit Appearance Override.

A heavy-duty combat helmet, forged from salvaged swarmer alloys. Imperceptible vibrations in the metal help to deflect incoming fire.

Transform the appearance of your Exosuit at an Appearance Modifier.

Items.Name: Direwasp Cuisses
Items.Description:
An exclusive Exosuit Appearance Override.

Heavy-duty combat armour, forged from salvaged swarmer alloys. Imperceptible vibrations in the metal help to deflect incoming fire.

Transform the appearance of your Exosuit at an Appearance Modifier.

Items.Name: Direwasp Flightpack
Items.Description:
An exclusive Exosuit Appearance Override.

This corrupted ichor-forged jetpack constantly hums and oscillates, as though buzzing with the rage of a thousand metal insects. An exclusive exosuit augmentation commemorating completion of the 'Swarm' Expedition.

Transform the appearance of your Exosuit at an Appearance Modifier.

Items.Name: Direwasp Chestpiece
Items.Description:
An exclusive Exosuit Appearance Override.

Heavy-duty combat armour, forged from salvaged swarmer alloys. Imperceptible vibrations in the metal help to deflect incoming fire.

Transform the appearance of your Exosuit at an Appearance Modifier.

Items.Name: WEAVERS
Items.Description: Currency or faction standing, given as a reward.

Items.Name: SAGES
Items.Description: Currency or faction standing, given as a reward.

Items.Name: ROYALS
Items.Description: Currency or faction standing, given as a reward.

Items.Name: Corrupted Ichor
Items.Description:
When swarmer shells are completely obliterated, this syrupy metal remains. It has a cloying, coppery smell that clings to the throat.

Pure corrupted ichor is always flowing, sluggishly folding its molecules over and over.

Items.Name: Frayed Synaptic Fibre
Items.Description: A critically damaged component housed within what appears to be the processing centre of a fallen swarmer. Partial functionality could be restored by repairing the component.

Items.Name: Shattered Cortex
Items.Description: A critically damaged component housed within what appears to be the processing centre of a fallen swarmer. Partial functionality could be restored by repairing the component.

Items.Name: Flickering Holo-bank
Items.Description: A critically damaged component housed within what appears to be the processing centre of a fallen swarmer. Partial functionality could be restored by repairing the component.

Items.Name: Pilot Echo
Items.Description:
The final sputtering flame of a Traveller soul.

This is the echo of an unfragmented Traveller, with equal fragments of Royal, Sage, and Weaver.

It is an essential component of their signature.

Items.Name: Weaver Echo
Items.Description:
A ghostly fragment of Traveller soul, lingering where it no longer belongs.

Data containing the weaver aspect of the Starship %SHIPNAME%'s previous owner.

Items.Name: Sage Echo
Items.Description:
A ghostly fragment of Traveller soul, lingering where it no longer belongs.

Data containing the sage aspect of the Starship %SHIPNAME%'s previous owner.

Items.Name: Royal Echo
Items.Description:
A ghostly fragment of Traveller soul, lingering where it no longer belongs.

Data containing the royal aspect of the Starship %SHIPNAME%'s previous owner.

Items.Name: Living Lens
Items.Description:
Slotting seamlessly into a Traveller Exosuit, this glassy technology links a Traveller fragment to Specialist Polo's Prismatic Core, reforging the many into one.

Protects against annihilation by the Hive of Glass.

Items.Name: Pilot Signature
Items.Description:
The final sputtering flame of a Traveller soul, bound in the remains of living creatures.

This identifying signature belonged to an intact, unfragmented Traveller, with equal fragments of Royal, Sage, and Weaver. It will unlock the Launch Thrusters of the starship %SHIPNAME%.

ChangedItems.Name: Corrupted Quad Egg
ChangedItems.Description:
A metal 'egg' capsule, ready to hatch!

The shell crackles with an electronic energy; mutated by Atlantideum, neutralised by [ redacted ].

Scans indicate the being within is programmed to be tireless and gLaSs.

Previous.Name: Corrupted Quad Egg
Previous.Description:
A metal 'egg' capsule, ready to hatch!

The shell crackles with an electronic energy; mutated by Atlantideum, neutralised by [ redacted ].

Scans indicate the being within is programmed to be tireless and gLaSs.

ChangedItems.Name: Aeron Crab Egg
ChangedItems.Description:
A living, fertile egg, ready to hatch!

Laid by a soft-skinned crustacean, this species has evolved a synergistic relationship with Travellers, occupying the discarded shells of slain Sentinel Quadrupeds.

Scans indicate the being within has the genetic potential to be shy and migratory.

Previous.Name: Aeron Crab Egg
Previous.Description:
A living, fertile egg, ready to hatch!

Laid by a soft-skinned crustacean, this species has evolved a synergistic relationship with Travellers, occupying the discarded shells of slain Sentinel Quadrupeds.

Scans indicate the being within has the genetic potential to be shy and migratory.

ChangedItems.Name: Wandering Shrimp Tank Egg
ChangedItems.Description:
A metal 'egg' capsule, ready to hatch!

Part robotic, part organic, part liquid. The primitive anatomy of this creature's conscious organ belies a deep, calculating intelligence.

Scans indicate the being within has the genetic potential to be focused and strategic.

Previous.Name: Wandering Shrimp Tank Egg
Previous.Description:
A metal 'egg' capsule, ready to hatch!

Part robotic, part organic, part liquid. The primitive anatomy of this creature's conscious organ belies a deep, calculating intelligence.

Scans indicate the being within has the genetic potential to be focused and strategic.

ChangedItems.Name: Boundary Horror Egg
ChangedItems.Description:
A living, fertile egg, ready to hatch!

It wails, sleepless.

Scans indicate the being within has the genetic potential to be haunting and adrift.

Previous.Name: Boundary Horror Egg
Previous.Description:
A living, fertile egg, ready to hatch!

It wails, sleepless.

Scans indicate the being within has the genetic potential to be haunting and adrift.

ChangedItems.Name: Geno-prawn Egg
ChangedItems.Description:
A living, fertile egg, ready to hatch!

The serpentine foetus stares directly through the membrane of its egg. It watches. It waits.

Scans indicate the being within has the genetic potential to be unblinking and slithering.

Previous.Name: Geno-prawn Egg
